name: Deyun Holding Ltd.
summary: Deyun Holding Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the manufacture of lace and provision of dyeing services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company manufactures and sells lace for customers to produce branded lingerie and other products on order-by-order basis. It also offers dyeing services primarily to lace and swim wear manufacturers. The company also exports its products to other countries, including Thailand, Vietnam, and Latvia. In addition, it is involved in the lease of an investment property through operating lease. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China. Deyun Holding Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Deyong Investment Co., Limited.
